fields.acceptance_criteria: Header, Layout, Sidebar (collapsible+resizable+mobile), Panel (left/right/top/bottom), GlassPanel ported from viewer-api TS; same CSS class names; responsive behavior preserved
fields.title: Port: Layout components — Header, Layout, Sidebar, Panel, GlassPanel

fields.acceptance_criteria: Header, Layout, Sidebar (collapsible+resizable+mobile-drawer), Panel (left/right/top/bottom), GlassPanel ported from viewer-api TS; same CSS class names preserved; mobile responsive improvements over existing viewer-api implementation: collapsible sidebar becomes full-screen drawer at breakpoints <=768px; stacked panel layout on mobile; touch-friendly tap targets (>=44px); swipe gesture for sidebar toggle
